positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully amongst bioluminescent flora and falling star particles. The fox should have a majestic, flowing silhouette and multiple shimmering tails. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo blues, ethereal cyan accents, and soft gold highlights. Use a negative space, minimalist aesthetic with strong contrast between the subject and the background. The composition is centered and highly decorative, optimized for apparel printing. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e mixed with modern graphic illustration, high saturation, clean lines, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, cinematic lighting, detailed engraving style.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, lowres, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, messy, graffiti
